ats_utilities.config_io.yaml.iyaml_processor module¶

iyaml_processor.py

Info

Defines abstract class IYAMLProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for processing YAML content.

class ats_utilities.config_io.yaml.iyaml_processor.IYAMLProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines interface IYAMLProcessor with attribute(s) and method(s). Interface for processing YAML content.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
decode - Convert raw YAML text to an internal object/structure (abstract).
encode - Convert an internal object/structure back to a YAML string (abstract).
to_dict - Return data as a flat dictionary required for ATSInfo (abstract).
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract decode(yaml_string: str) → bool[source]¶

Convert raw YAML text to an internal object/structure.

Parameters:

yaml_string (<str>) – Raw YAML text

Returns:

True (content decoded) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract encode() → str[source]¶

Convert an internal object/structure back to a YAML string.

Returns:

YAML content as string

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract to_dict() → Dict[Any, Any][source]¶

Return data as a flat dictionary.

Returns:

Dictionary with YAML information

Return type:

<Dict[Any, Any]>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
